context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 94
WINDOW: 1347.100s to 1384.133s (smile at 1367.100s to 1369.133s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1317.750-1370.660] interviewee: what is your name? I gave him my name. And I waited a minute, a couple minutes. He opens the door and leads me to an office, a huge office. This was in the hospital-- a huge office. In the back behind the desk sits an older officer. I recognize right away on the epaulets he's a doctor, because they have the snake, the doctors.
[1370.660-1477.560] interviewee: And he said, sit down. I was wondering, me? I'm a Jew. He tells me to sit down. I sit down. What is your name? I gave him my name. Is your father alive? I said, yes. What is his name? Leopold.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
because they have the snake,
